result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 22:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id
), case_base AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(c.id, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS current_owner,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), eligible_cases AS (
  -- cases not transferred: no owner change events
  SELECT cb.case_id, cb.current_owner AS agent_id, cb.createddate, cb.closeddate
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- count cases per agent for filter (>1) based on both initial assignment and transfers
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    -- initial/current owner from case record
    SELECT cb.current_owner AS agent_id, cb.case_id
    FROM case_base cb
    UNION ALL
    -- old and new owners from owner assignment history
    SELECT oa.old_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oa.new_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    ec.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS cases_closed_no_transfer
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY ec.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
  AND a.cases_closed_no_transfer > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id
), case_base AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(c.id, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS current_owner,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), eligible_cases AS (
  -- cases not transferred: no owner change events
  SELECT cb.case_id, cb.current_owner AS agent_id, cb.createddate, cb.closeddate
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- count cases per agent for filter (>1) based on both initial assignment and transfers
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    -- initial/current owner from case record
    SELECT cb.current_owner AS agent_id, cb.case_id
    FROM case_base cb
    UNION ALL
    -- old and new owners from owner assignment history
    SELECT oa.old_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oa.new_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    ec.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS cases_closed_no_transfer
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY ec.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
  AND a.cases_closed_no_transfer > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,

    ch.id

    c.createddate,

  -- cases not transferred: no owner change events
  SELECT cb.case_id, cb.current_owner AS agent_id, cb.createddate, cb.closeddate
  FROM case_base cb

    SELECT oa.old_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oa.new_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa

  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id

  SELECT
    ec.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,

ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(ch.caseid__c, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    ch.id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id
), case_base AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(c.id, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS current_owner,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id, cb.current_owner AS agent_id, cb.created_ts, cb.closed_ts
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT cb.current_owner AS agent_id, cb.case_id
    FROM case_base cb
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oa.old_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oa.new_owner AS agent_id, oa.case_id
    FROM owner_assignments oa
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    ec.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closed_ts - ec.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS cases_closed_no_transfer
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY ec.agent_id

FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
  AND a.cases_closed_no_transfer > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
